title: garuga pinnata var. pierrei
intro: Garuga pinnata var. pierrei, also known as Garuga pierrei, is a plant species within the family Burseraceae, native to tropical Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. In traditional medicine, Garuga pinnata var. pierrei is prepared as a decoction, infusion, or paste for its various uses, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
